column1: # First match wins. Keep exceptions above generic rules. `--validate-map` checks every witness.

column3: shared usagi-core test support affects consumers
shared IPC protocol affects multiple workspace packages
shared usagi-daemon test support affects consumers
shared root integration harness affects consumer tests
vendored v1 terminal parser affects terminal and TUI behavior
column4: cargo test --manifest-path v1/third_party/vt100/Cargo.toml|cargo test --manifest-path v1/Cargo.toml --test tui_e2e|cargo test --manifest-path v1/Cargo.toml --quiet

column3: documentation changed; Rust gate can be skipped for docs-only changes
retained v1 implementation still ships releases; run the v1 suite via its own manifest
column4: cargo clippy --all-targets --manifest-path v1/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings|cargo test --manifest-path v1/Cargo.toml --quiet
